presentation.name: Hi, I'm
presentation.title: Senior Software Engineer
presentation.subtitle: I build frontend systems that hold up over time. My focus is Next.js, TypeScript, and making the architectural calls that keep teams from slowing down.

cards.years-experience: Over <highlight>{time} shipping production software</highlight>, from early-stage startups to distributed teams. I know which tradeoffs matter and which ones are a distraction.
cards.attention-details: I write code the next engineer can follow. <highlight>Testability and maintainability</highlight> are things I design for upfront, not fix later.
cards.worldwide: I've worked with people across <highlight>different timezones and cultures</highlight>. That experience made clear that communication and async habits matter as much as the code itself.

articles.title: Writing
articles.quote: I write when I've worked through something worth sharing. Practical pieces on architecture, tradeoffs, and problems I've run into in real codebases.

references.title: What people say
references.quote: Feedback from engineers and managers I've worked with, across different companies, timezones, and stages of product.
references.leave-reference: Worked with me? Leave a recommendation on LinkedIn.

projects.title: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
projects.all-projects: Do you wanna see all projects? Click here! 💻

cards-description.my-portfolio: This is super portfolio project, to show my skills and experiences. It's a Next.js app with Tailwind CSS and Typescript. integrated with AI tools to generate Email and a markdown editor.
cards-description.lnk-bio: This is a link shortener that allows you to create a custom page with your social media links. It's a Next.js app with Tailwind CSS and Typescript.
cards-description.prep-pal: This is a tool that helps you to prepare for a job interview. It uses OpenAI's GPT-3 to generate questions and answers based on the job description.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project, role, or idea worth discussing? I read every message.
